parameters.name: Subscription
parameters.query:
summarize by subscriptionId
| project value = strcat('/subscriptions/', subscriptionId), label = subscriptionId

content.json:
## Overview

The number below is how many resources **you can see, right now, that need action**. The bar chart breaks that down by how urgent each finding is. Full detail (what's wrong, and what to do about it) is on the **My Non-Compliant Resources** tab.

content.query:
PolicyResources
| where type == 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates'
| where properties.complianceState == 'NonCompliant'
| extend ResourceId = tostring(properties.resourceId),
         Effect = tolower(tostring(properties.policyDefinitionAction))
| extend Urgency = case(
    Effect in ('deny', 'deployifnotexists', 'modify'), 'Critical',
    Effect in ('auditifnotexists', 'audit'), 'Warning',
    'Informational')
| summarize NonCompliantResources = dcount(ResourceId), Critical = dcountif(ResourceId, Urgency == 'Critical'), Warning = dcountif(ResourceId, Urgency == 'Warning')

PolicyResources
| where type == 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates'
| where properties.complianceState == 'NonCompliant'
| extend Effect = tolower(tostring(properties.policyDefinitionAction))
| extend Urgency = case(
    Effect in ('deny', 'deployifnotexists', 'modify'), 'Critical',
    Effect in ('auditifnotexists', 'audit'), 'Warning',
    'Informational')
| summarize Findings = count() by Urgency
| order by Findings desc

content.json:
## My Non-Compliant Resources

Grouped by policy/initiative, most urgent first. **Critical** = blocked or not self-remediating (Deny / DeployIfNotExists); **Warning** = flagged by an audit-only policy, nothing is blocked. The **Guidance** column tells you what to do about each one.

content.query:
PolicyResources
| where type == 'microsoft.policyinsights/policystates'
| where properties.complianceState == 'NonCompliant'
| where strcat('/subscriptions/', tostring(properties.subscriptionId)) in ({Subscription})
| extend ResourceId = tostring(properties.resourceId),
         ResourceType = tostring(properties.resourceType),
         PolicyAssignmentIdKey = tolower(tostring(properties.policyAssignmentId)),
         PolicyDefinitionReferenceId = tostring(properties.policyDefinitionReferenceId),
         Effect = tolower(tostring(properties.policyDefinitionAction))
| extend Urgency = case(
    Effect in ('deny', 'deployifnotexists', 'modify'), 'Critical',
    Effect in ('auditifnotexists', 'audit'), 'Warning',
    'Informational'),
  UrgencyRank = case(
    Effect in ('deny', 'deployifnotexists', 'modify'), 0,
    Effect in ('auditifnotexists', 'audit'), 1,
    2)
| join kind=leftouter (
    PolicyResources
    | where type == 'microsoft.authorization/policyassignments'
    | project PolicyAssignmentIdKey = tolower(id), AssignmentDisplayName = tostring(properties.displayName)
  ) on PolicyAssignmentIdKey
| join kind=leftouter (
    PolicyResources
    | where type == 'microsoft.authorization/policyassignments'
    | project PolicyAssignmentIdKey = tolower(id), NonComplianceMessages = properties.nonComplianceMessages
    | mv-expand Msg = NonComplianceMessages
    | extend MsgRefId = tostring(Msg.policyDefinitionReferenceId), MsgText = tostring(Msg.message)
    | where isnotempty(MsgRefId)
    | project PolicyAssignmentIdKey, PolicyDefinitionReferenceId = MsgRefId, SpecificMessage = MsgText
  ) on PolicyAssignmentIdKey, PolicyDefinitionReferenceId
| join kind=leftouter (
    PolicyResources
    | where type == 'microsoft.authorization/policyassignments'
    | project PolicyAssignmentIdKey = tolower(id), NonComplianceMessages = properties.nonComplianceMessages
    | mv-expand Msg = NonComplianceMessages
    | extend MsgRefId = tostring(Msg.policyDefinitionReferenceId), MsgText = tostring(Msg.message)
    | where isempty(MsgRefId)
    | project PolicyAssignmentIdKey, DefaultMessage = MsgText
  ) on PolicyAssignmentIdKey
| extend GuidanceMessage = coalesce(SpecificMessage, DefaultMessage, "No guidance authored yet for this policy.")
| sort by UrgencyRank asc, AssignmentDisplayName asc
| project Urgency, AssignmentDisplayName, GuidanceMessage, ResourceId, PolicyDefinitionReferenceId, Effect, ResourceType
